posting.sourceTitle: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund
posting.jobTitle: Linoleum, Resilient Tile and Carpet Layer Apprentice
posting.sponsorName: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund
posting.locationSummary: New York State excluding Nassau, Suffolk, and the five boroughs of New York City
posting.applicationSummary: Apply online at NASCTF.org during the recruitment period after attending a required in-person information session and receiving the passcode needed to complete the application.
posting.applicationHours: For application help by phone: Monday through Friday, 9:00 a.m. to 3:00 p.m.
posting.applicationLimitDetails: Information sessions are limited and filled on a first-come, first-served basis.
posting.ageRequirement: Must be at least 17 years old.
posting.residencyRequirement: Must live in the geographical jurisdiction, which includes all New York State counties except Nassau, Suffolk, and the counties of the five boroughs of New York City (Kings, Bronx, Queens, New York, and Richmond).
posting.transportationRequirement: Must have reliable transportation and be willing to travel to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.
posting.drugTestRequirement: Must pass a drug test after selection and prior to enrollment, at the sponsor's expense. If the applicant tests positive, they cannot reapply for one year.
posting.classRequirement: Must be willing to attend required classes at the approved school.
allRequirements: Must be at least 17 years old.

Must attest in writing that they are physically able to perform the work of a Linoleum, Resilient Tile and Carpet Layer apprentice, including working with stationary and portable hand and power tools, standing and stooping for prolonged periods, working in all types of weather including extreme heat and cold, performing constant repetitive motions, and lifting or holding items weighing a minimum of 50 lbs.
Must pass a drug test after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship, at the sponsor's expense. If the applicant tests positive, they cannot reapply for one year.
Must be willing to attend required classes at the approved school.
Must have reliable transportation and be willing to travel to and from various job sites and required classes at the approved school.

Must live in the geographical jurisdiction, which includes all New York State counties except Nassau, Suffolk, and the counties of the five boroughs of New York City (Kings, Bronx, Queens, New York, and Richmond).

Must be willing to travel to various locations within the geographical jurisdiction of NASCTF, which includes all New York State counties except Nassau, Suffolk, and the counties of the five boroughs of New York City (Kings, Bronx, Queens, New York, and Richmond).
Must provide military transfer card or discharge form DD-214, if applicable, after selection and prior to enrollment in apprenticeship.
posting.requirementsSummary: Applicants must be at least 17, live in the sponsor’s jurisdiction, have reliable transportation, attend required classes, pass a drug test after selection, and meet the physical and documentation requirements listed.
posting.contactName: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund
posting.contactSummary: North Atlantic States Carpenters Training Fund at (585) 436-1110 for further information or help completing the online application.
